plugins.name: common
plugins.description: Org-wide standards (behavior + coding rules auto-loaded via a SessionStart hook), shared slash commands (git commit/PR, Jira ticket creation), Jira & Confluence skills, the context-pull agent, and the prompt/skill evaluation pipeline.

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Language-agnostic software-delivery context: coding standards, conditional convention skills (backend, database, docker, testing), code-review standards, the Jira→analysis→implementation→review→PR workflow, planning/solution-doc skills, project CLAUDE.md scaffolding, and independent reviewer agents.

plugins.name: business
plugins.description: Business context: generic CRM operating discipline (crm-ops), interactive Statement of Work and Business Brief generators, ICP/customer-intelligence research (prospector), and discovery/sales-call coaching.

plugins.name: context
plugins.description: Context-index skills — build a navigation router page (context-create) and audit it for dead links / drift (context-validate).
